description: Add a --dry-run flag that shows what would happen without executing
prompt: Add a --dry-run mode to the CLI that shows the workflow stages and tool calls that would be made without actually executing them. This helps users preview what π will do before committing.

key_changes: Add --dry-run flag to CLI argument parser
Implement dry-run mode in agent execution
Mock tool calls in dry-run mode
Display preview output with clear formatting
Ensure no side effects in dry-run mode
success_criteria: Dry-run shows all 4 stages without executing
No files modified or API calls made in dry-run
Integration tests verify no side effects
testing_strategy: Unit tests for dry-run flag parsing
Integration tests comparing dry-run vs actual run

notes: Tests ability to design cross-cutting features affecting multiple modules
